description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in telltarget CMS 1.3.3 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the (1) ordnertiefe parameter to site_conf.php; or the (2) tt_docroot parameter to (a) class.csv.php, (b) produkte_nach_serie.php, or (c) ref_kd_rubrik.php in functionen/; (d) hg_referenz_jobgalerie.php, (e) surfer_anmeldung_NWL.php, (f) produkte_nach_serie_alle.php, (g) surfer_aendern.php, (h) ref_kd_rubrik.php, or (i) referenz.php in module/; or (j) 1/lay.php or (k) 3/lay.php in standard/.
